assessment.note: Carl identifies 'developing the team' as a key expectation, showing some clarity on the role's demands.

new_queue.label: Role stretch
new_queue.name: What part of the team lead role do you think will stretch you the most?
new_queue.description: Identifies which aspects of the team lead role Carl expects to be most challenging.

new_queue.label: Impact through leadership
new_queue.name: How would leading the team amplify your impact?
new_queue.description: Explores how Carl envisions increasing his influence through leadership.

new_queue.label: Delegation comfort
new_queue.name: How comfortable are you with delegating tasks currently?
new_queue.description: Assesses Carl's readiness and comfort with delegating work effectively.

new_queue.label: Communication for leadership
new_queue.name: What do you think is key in communicating effectively as a team leader?
new_queue.description: Probes Carl's understanding of essential communication skills for leadership.

new_queue.label: Developing the team
new_queue.name: What does 'developing the team' look like to you in practice?
new_queue.description: Seeks to understand Carl's vision of team development as a leader.
